data.title: Abraxas Capital Withdrew More Than 13,700 ETH from Binance in 12 Hours, Worth About $36.4 Million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, Abraxas Capital withdrew 13,771 ETH from Binance in the past 12 hours, worth about 36.4 million US dollars.

data.title: Binance Launches Referral Promotion with USDC Rewards
data.description:
According to Binance's official announcement, the cryptocurrency exchange is introducing a limited-time referral promotion aimed at expanding its community. Participants can earn rewards from a pool of 25,000 USDC in token vouchers by inviting friends to sign up and trade on the platform. The promotion period is set from 2025-06-05 00:00 (UTC) to 2025-07-05 23:59 (UTC).

**Participation Details:**

- **Referral Process:** Users can share a referral link with friends, who must complete specific tasks to qualify for rewards.

- **Tasks for Referees:** New users must deposit at least $50 via Cash Deposit, Credit/Debit Card, or P2P Trading, and trade a minimum of $100 on Binance Spot or Convert.

- **Rewards:** Successful referrals allow both the referrer and referee to unlock a 10 USDC token voucher. Each referrer can earn up to 50 USDC by inviting multiple friends.

**Terms and Conditions:**

- **Eligibility:** Only users from certain regions can participate. Restricted regions are excluded from the referral program.

- **Trading Volume:** Spot zero fee trading pairs and certain stablecoin trades do not count towards the trading volume requirement.

- **Reward Distribution:** Rewards are distributed on a first-come, first-served basis. Participants must open the Reward Box within the promotion period to receive their token vouchers.

**Additional Information:**

- **Disqualification:** Binance reserves the right to disqualify participants engaging in fraudulent activities, such as using the same IP or device for multiple registrations.

- **Compliance:** Unauthorized stablecoins face restrictions for EEA users, and trading volumes on specific pairs do not count for these users.

- **Final Interpretation:** Binance holds the right to interpret the promotion's terms and conditions.

Participants are encouraged to refer to the original English version of the announcement for the most accurate information, as translated versions may contain discrepancies. The Binance team appreciates the community's support and participation in this promotional activity.

data.title: Amazon to Test Humanoid Robots for Package Delivery
data.description: According to PANews, Amazon is preparing to test humanoid robots for delivering packages. This initiative marks a significant step in the company's efforts to enhance its delivery capabilities and explore innovative solutions in logistics. The move aligns with Amazon's ongoing commitment to integrating advanced technology into its operations to improve efficiency and customer service.

data.title: Ripple CTO confirms XRP, XRPL and RLUSD form new decentralised financial system
data.description:
5-6-2025 – Ripple’s Chief Technology Officer, David Schwartz, has confirmed the development of an integrated financial ecosystem anchored by the XRP Ledger (XRPL), the XRP token, and the newly launched RLUSD stablecoin. The announcement, made during a candid exchange with crypto journalist Vincent Scott at the recent XRP Las Vegas event, casts light on Ripple’s [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/ripple-cto-confirms-xrp-xrpl-and-rlusd-form-new-decentralised-financial-system/

data.title: Coinbase launches cbDOGE and cbXRP, logs on Base chain and provides 1:1 custody reserves
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the announcement of Coinbase Assets, Coinbase has launched cbDOGE and cbXRP on the Base chain. Both are ERC-20 tokens, supported by 1:1 escrowed DOGE and XRP respectively.

data.title: Planet Morning News
A whale sold 57,800 TRUMP 4 hours ago, losing $205,000, and still holds 370,400 TRUMP
data.description:
According to Odaily Planet Daily, according to The Data Nerd, last month, a whale hoarded 443,700 TRUMP (about 6.34 million US dollars), with an average price of about 14.34 US dollars. 4 hours ago, he sold 57,800 TRUMP (624,000 US dollars), with a loss of about 205,000 US dollars. 
Currently, he still holds 370,400 TRUMP (about 4.01 million US dollars), with an unrealized loss of about 1.31 million US dollars.

data.title: YZi Labs announced an investment in OneKey, and the funds will be used to iterate the next generation of hardware devices and strengthen on-chain threat detection and contract analysis capabilities
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News YZi Labs announced its investment in the open source hardware wallet project OneKey, aiming to enhance the security of global encrypted assets and provide users with a low-threshold self-custody solution.
OneKey was founded in 2019, with teams in China, Japan, South Korea, Dubai and Italy. In three years, user asset protection has increased 11 times, and the annual sales of hardware wallets have increased by an average of 300%. The product is open source, secure and easy to use, and is favored by users in the Asian, European, Australian and Brazilian markets.
This round of financing will be used to iterate the next generation of hardware devices, strengthen on-chain threat detection and contract parsing capabilities, and accelerate compliance and user growth plans in the United States, Europe and emerging markets. YZi Labs said that OneKey is the "key entrance to Web3" and will help global users control their assets with peace of mind.

data.title: TRUMP Wallet X account has been unfrozen
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: TRUMP Wallet X account @TrumpWalletApp has been unfrozen. Information on the official website of TRUMP Wallet shows that the wallet was jointly developed by Magic Eden and TRUMP Meme.
It was previously reported that Donald Trump Jr., the eldest son of Trump, issued a statement to clarify that the Trump Group has no connection with this wallet product, and WLFI will launch an official wallet.

data.title: LBank has launched Janitor (JANITOR)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank has launched Janitor (JANITOR) at 22:50 (SGT) on June 4, and opened the JANITOR/USDT trading pair. Currently, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 21:00 on June 5.

data.title: ChatGPT Expands Real-Time Connectivity with Popular Data Sources
data.description: According to PANews, OpenAI has announced that ChatGPT now supports real-time connections with internal data sources such as Outlook, Gmail, and Google Drive. This feature is available for Plus/Pro users, excluding those in the European Union, Switzerland, and the United Kingdom, as well as Team, Enterprise, and Edu versions. Additionally, enterprise and advanced users can utilize the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to customize connectors, integrating proprietary systems and knowledge bases. Team users on macOS will be the first to experience the 'recording mode,' which automatically transcribes meetings and voice content, generating summaries or subsequent action plans.
